info.title: Il2CppInterop.CLI
info.description: CLI tool for generating managed proxy assemblies for Il2Cpp

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generate Managed<->IL2CPP interop assemblies from Cpp2IL's output.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze deobfuscation performance with different parameter values. Will not generate assemblies.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a deobfuscation map from original unobfuscated assemblies. Will not generate assemblies.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate wrapper assemblies that can be used to interop with Il2Cpp

commands.name: wrapper-gen
commands.description: Tools for generating Il2Cpp struct wrappers from libi2lcpp source
